title.en: If he really was a replica body, then he would ...

content.en:
Of course, there will definitely be a lot of Supreme Dao Void Demons in this vicinity.

If he really was a replica body, then he would definitely die.

Like the Longqin Palace Master, they also dissuaded themselves from coming, and they most likely knew that their doppelganger would definitely die.

But they couldn't beat him.

In fact, it's true, he can lose more than one replica body along the way!

It's good that he's here, and it's all worth it.

"The comprehension of the Divine Dao monster replicating body is not very high, if you go in to comprehend, it will undoubtedly be ineffective. "

Ye Tian is ready to let the true body copy body enter the glass light rift, and let the true body copy body all the way to comprehend the seventh sequence to the Dao rules, even if it falls, it doesn't matter.

"Then do it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He came a little to a place not too far from here, hidden in a fragment, and more than a little concealment formation, and then began to copy his true body.

Soon, a real body replica body was successfully condensed.

"Go!"

Ye Tian's true body copied his body and shuttled in, directly entering the glass light rift.

As soon as he entered, the terrifying light was eroding his physical body, even if he cast the eighth sequence of Dao Divine Power to Dao Vajra Body, it was useless.

But soon, Ye Tian was attracted by the seventh sequence of the Dao rules here.

Airplanes!

His will gradually became immersed in it, and he comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of the Dao, and even forgot the pain in his body.

Time passes.

Ye Tian's replica body was gradually severely damaged and even about to fall, but he could forcibly awaken this real replica body with the help of other replica bodies.

But it's not necessary.

After another period of time, Ye Tian's replica body completely fell.

However, Ye Tian was very excited.

"Sure enough, you can comprehend the seventh sequence of supreme rules with the help of the glass light rift here, but it's not enough to comprehend it once!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

If you comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao once, those sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons have come.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's second true body copy body shuttled into the glass light rift again, and once again comprehended the seventh sequence of Dao rules.

This time, he still came to his senses until he fell.

After that, he continued to send the True Body to copy the body to comprehend the seventh sequence of the Dao Rules.

Three times!

Four times!

Five times!

......

Ye Tian didn't know how many times he had entered the glass light rift.

At this moment, he was already about to comprehend the true Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and his whole body was contemplating the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

this day.

Rumble!!!!

The rules of the seventh sequence of the supreme path have been thoroughly comprehended.

But at this moment, he found that he was ostracized by the glass light rift.

"It's a pity, I originally wanted to continue to comprehend the seventh sequence of supreme dao rules in the glass light rift, but after comprehending the seventh sequence supreme dao rules, I was directly excluded!" Ye Tian muttered.

But when you think about it, it's normal.

If it is not excluded, the sevenfold and even eightfold supreme realm among the supreme Dao Void Demons can completely enter here to comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of supreme dao!

"Scatter!"

Ye Tian's replica body dispersed.

Next, his focus still has to be on the third-level battlefield.

Therefore, he needs to use a lot of copy bodies, and he has no time to break into the void domain.

Moreover, he also had to create the seventh sequence of supreme rules, which could be described as very busy.

......

"The Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules are too powerful, just by comprehending the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, my Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Divine Powers have skyrocketed several times. Ye Tian muttered.

Originally, his combat power was invincible in the fivefold Dao realm, but now even if he was an invincible supreme void demon in the fivefold Dao realm, he could kill it in an instant.

In other words, he has the power of the Sixfold Dao Realm.

And on the third-level battlefield, the cultivation of the sixfold to the Dao realm will be suppressed, but he is only in the late stage of the second-level Dao realm, so naturally he will not be suppressed.

"Hahaha, now that I'm above the battle, even if I can't defeat those top Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, but after their strength is suppressed, don't even think about killing me!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Next.

He was going to kill some more Supreme Dao Void Demons, and gather enough Heaven and Earth Origin Gifts to impact the Peak Realm of the Double Dao Realm.

True Dao Domain.

In a vast fortress in the territory occupied by the Void Demons.

A supreme path void demon with an incomparably condensed aura came, and his arrival made all the supreme path void demons show a look of awe.

"Your Highness The Hague!"

Many Supreme Dao Void Demons lowered their heads one after another.

Among them, there are many sixfold supreme path void demons.

The reason why they were so respectful to His Highness The Hague was because His Highness The Hague came from a very powerful family of Supreme Void Demons.

Although the Supreme Dao Void Demon is cruel, wanting to occupy the Innate Origin Domain and killing all the lives of the Innate Origin Domain, they are still intelligent beings, and they also pay attention to bloodline, the higher the strength of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, the higher the wisdom.

Even those weak Supreme Dao Void Demons have very low wisdom, and Supreme Dao Demons have no wisdom.

For example, His Highness The Hague, his father is a Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon, and there is also an Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon Ancestor in the family.

These Supreme Void Demons were all under the command of this Supreme Void Demon Family, so they didn't dare to be disrespectful to His Highness The Hague.

"Your Highness The Hague, what are you doing here, this is a battlefield, it's too dangerous!" asked a sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon.

His Highness The Hague said lightly: "I have reached the peak of the Fifth Rank Dao Void Demon for a long time, and this third-level battlefield is not very dangerous, so I want to sharpen it here." Besides, with my strength and life-saving means, the Sixfold Dao Realm can't kill me, so what's the danger. "

The other Supreme Void Demons didn't speak, and they didn't dare to refute it.

Of course, they also knew that His Highness The Hague was very demonic, although he had not yet reached the sixfold supreme realm realm, but he had already comprehended the eighth sequence of supreme dao rules to the tenth realm, and maybe one day he would be able to comprehend the seventh sequence supreme dao rules.

Therefore, His Highness The Hague is an invincible existence in the Fivefold Supreme Dao Realm, and it is only invincible to the Sixth Supreme Dao Realm.

"You guys are ready, these Supreme Dao Realms who have invaded the Infinite Domain on a large scale, I will join the battle and kill a group of Supreme Dao Realms!" His Highness The Hague ordered.

"Yes!"

Many supreme demons answer the way.

......

Not long after, a large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons invaded.

The Supreme Dao Realm of Taisu Palace and many other forces began to resist, and used many large arrays to defend the last piece of territory.

And after Ye Tian found out, he also immediately joined the battle.

However, as always, he was ready to sneak up on the rear of the Dao Void Demon.

"The Supreme Dao Void Demon must have set a trap in the rear, but if they underestimate my strength, then wait to fall into my prey!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon.

He used the Supreme Dao Monster to copy his body, allowing the real body to enter the back of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, and locked a large fortress.
